title: The Peterhead-Goldeneye Gas Post-combustion CCS Project
authors: Bill Spence; Denise Horan; Owain Tucker
why_relevant: Public Goldeneye CCS project paper; useful for pipeline, storage, transport distance, capture rate and project-context assumptions.
next_action: Extract model-relevant facts into a notes file with page/section traceability.

title: A technical evaluation to analyse of potential repurposing of submarine pipelines for hydrogen and CCS using survival analysis
authors: Ramy Magdy A. Mahmoud; Paul E. Dodds
why_relevant: Directly relevant to submarine pipeline repurposing for CCS and hydrogen; uses survival analysis and includes Goldeneye as a CO2 case study.
next_action: Use as a benchmark source for remaining-life screening and compare its Goldeneye assumptions with our model.

title: Repurposing natural gas pipelines for hydrogen: Limits and options from a case study in Germany
authors: Kornel Telessy; Lukas Barner; Franziska Holz
why_relevant: Hydrogen-focused but useful for defining repurposing scope options and cost comparison logic: enhanced maintenance, gaseous inhibitors, and pipe-in-pipe.
next_action: Use as a supporting source for the repurposing-scope and cost-structure design, not as a direct CO2 integrity standard.
